title: CustomAction
content:
# CustomAction


## Properties

- **id** (`string`): 
- **timestamp** (`string`): The timestamp of when the Custom Action was created. It may differ from 'created' when created on the edge.
- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Recommendation Type was created on the database, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **created_by** (`string`): The user or process that initiated the creation of this custom action.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Recommendation Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **updated_by** (`string`): The user or process that updated this custom action.
- **type** (`string`): The type of the action. This is used to identify the action in the system.
- **type_title** (`string`): The type name of the action.
- **resource** (`string`): 
- **title** (`string`): The title of the action. This is a short description of the action that will be displayed to the user.
- **description** (`string`): The description of the action. This is a longer description of the action that will be displayed to the user.
- **expiration_date** (`string`): The expiration date of the action. The action will be automatically cancelled if it is not completed by this date.
- **payload** (`object`): The payload is a JSON object that contains the necessary information for the executor to perform the action. The structure of the payload will depend on the action type.
- **trace_id** (`string`): 
- **state** (`string`): The state of an action.
- **failure_reason** (`string`): The error type of an action, if any.

* `none`: No error. The same as empty, used when the action is not completed or completed successfully.
* `reported_failed`: The action was reported as failed by the executor.
* `expired`: The action was not delivered to an executor before the expiration date.
* `lost`: The action was delivered to the executor, but the executor restarted without reporting the status.
* `executor_gone`: The action was delivered to the executor, but the executor is no longer available and the expiration date was reached.
* `other`: Other error.
- **message** (`string`): A message associated with the state transition.
- **status_logs** (`array`): The transitions array contains a list of entries that describe the action state transitions.
summary: Object with properties: id, timestamp, created, created_by, updated

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the Custom Action was created. It may differ from 'created' when created on the edge.

created.description: UTC time when the Recommendation Type was created on the database, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: The user or process that initiated the creation of this custom action.

updated.description: UTC time when any Recommendation Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated_by.description: The user or process that updated this custom action.

type.description: The type of the action. This is used to identify the action in the system.

type_title.description: The type name of the action.

title.description: The title of the action. This is a short description of the action that will be displayed to the user.

description.example: Beam Pump GW-B12-037 needs to be diagnosed.
description.description: The description of the action. This is a longer description of the action that will be displayed to the user.

expiration_date.description: The expiration date of the action. The action will be automatically cancelled if it is not completed by this date.

payload.description: The payload is a JSON object that contains the necessary information for the executor to perform the action. The structure of the payload will depend on the action type.

failure_reason.description:
The error type of an action, if any.

* `none`: No error. The same as empty, used when the action is not completed or completed successfully.
* `reported_failed`: The action was reported as failed by the executor.
* `expired`: The action was not delivered to an executor before the expiration date.
* `lost`: The action was delivered to the executor, but the executor restarted without reporting the status.
* `executor_gone`: The action was delivered to the executor, but the executor is no longer available and the expiration date was reached.
* `other`: Other error.

message.description: A message associated with the state transition.

status_logs.description: The transitions array contains a list of entries that describe the action state transitions.
